chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-35 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 10-04-2019. Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for Petitioner. = Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been resolved, as such, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
